headline: APA Corporation: No Hedges, No Limits--Perfectly Positioned To Benefit From Eleveted Oil Prices
summary: APA stock outlook: unhedged leverage to oil prices, stronger margins and Suriname upside. See 2026 free cash flow estimate and $51.5 target (+35%).
